title: Media Downloader
ask_to_stop_download: Are you sure to stop the download?
help_message:
To use this application, enter the media URL, select your options, and click Download.

--- ENCODERS ---
• libx264: CPU-based H.264; Best compatibility/quality.
• libx265: CPU-based HEVC; 50% better compression (slower).
• hevc_vaapi: Linux hardware HEVC (Intel/AMD); Very fast.
• h264_vaapi: Linux hardware H.264 (Intel/AMD); Very fast.
• hevc_qsv: Intel Quick Sync HEVC; Optimized for Intel iGPUs.
• h264_qsv: Intel Quick Sync H.264; Fast and stable.

--- QUALITY (CRF: 0-51) ---
• 0: Lossless (Huge files).
• 18: Visually transparent (High quality).
• 23: Default (Great balance).
• 28: Acceptable (Small files, mobile use).
• 30-35: Visible pixelation (Blurry details).
• 40+: Very poor quality (Muddy image).

--- PRESETS (Speed vs Compression) ---
• ultrafast/superfast: Instant encoding, very large files.
• veryfast/faster: Good for live streaming or mid-range CPUs.
• medium: Default standard balance.
• slow/slower: High compression, small files (Needs high CPU).
• veryslow: Best compression, extremely slow.

For more info: https://github.com/hmidani-abdelilah/Media_Downloader
shutdown_countdown: The computer will shutdown in {0} seconds. Do you want to cancel the shutdown?
shutdown_without_closing: You have selected to shutdown the computer after download without selecting to close the application. This may cause the computer to shutdown while the application is still running. Do you want to proceed?
ask_to_stop_download_on_exit: A download is in progress. Are you sure you want to exit?
playlist_detected_msg: This link contains a playlist. What do you want to download?
